subcodes.first_line: O my Lord and my God, my All-Sufficing Shelter and my Most Exalted Haven! Thou dost behold Thy loved ones who stand firm in Thy Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی و کهفی الوافی و ملاذی السامی تری احبائک الثابتین علی المیثاق
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant
